dashboard.label: Netflix Content Analytics
dashboard.description: Streaming performance dashboard with branded custom visualizations
dashboard.definition: {"dataSources":{"ds_kpi_summary":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_kpi_summary.csv","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"KPI Summary"},"ds_kpi_subscribers":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_kpi_summary.csv | where metric=\"Total Subscribers\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"KPI Subscribers"},"ds_kpi_revenue":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_kpi_summary.csv | where metric=\"Monthly Revenue\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"KPI Revenue"},"ds_kpi_hours":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_kpi_summary.csv | where metric=\"Hours Streamed\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"KPI Hours Streamed"},"ds_engagement":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_engagement.csv","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Engagement Metrics"},"ds_engagement_completion":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_engagement.csv | where metric=\"Avg Completion Rate\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Completion Rate"},"ds_engagement_bounce":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_engagement.csv | where metric=\"Bounce Rate\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Bounce Rate"},"ds_engagement_repeat":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_engagement.csv | where metric=\"Repeat Viewing\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Repeat Viewing"},"ds_top_titles":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_top_titles.csv | sort 0 -views","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Top Titles"},"ds_weekly_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_weekly_trend.csv","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Weekly Trend"},"ds_genre_performance":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_genre_performance.csv | sort 0 -total_views","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Genre Performance"},"ds_regional":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| inputlookup netflix_viz_pack_regional.csv | sort 0 -subscribers","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-24h","latest":"now"}},"name":"Regional Breakdown"}},"visualizations":{"viz_banner_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#E50914","strokeColor":"transparent","rx":0,"ry":0}},"viz_banner_title":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"# NETFLIX CONTENT ANALYTICS","fontColor":"#F5F5F1","fontSize":"large","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_banner_accent":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#B20710","strokeColor":"transparent","rx":0,"ry":0}},"viz_kpi_subscribers":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_subscribers"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.deltaField":"delta","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.label":"Total Subscribers","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unit":"M","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unitPosition":"after","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.decimals":"0","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.showDelta":"true","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.alignment":"left","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentIntensity":"60"}},"viz_kpi_revenue":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_revenue"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.deltaField":"delta","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.label":"Monthly Revenue","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unit":"$B","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unitPosition":"before","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.showDelta":"true","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.alignment":"left","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentIntensity":"40"}},"viz_kpi_hours":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_kpi_hours"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.deltaField":"delta","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.label":"Hours Streamed","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unit":"B hrs","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.unitPosition":"after","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.showDelta":"true","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.alignment":"left","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.hero_kpi.accentIntensity":"40"}},"viz_stat_strip":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_engagement"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.metricField":"metric","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.valueField":"value","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.deltaField":"delta","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.unitField":"unit","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.stat_strip.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_trend_area":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.trend_area","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_weekly_trend"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.labelField":"week_number","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.series":"new_signups,churned","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.seriesLabels":"New Signups,Churned","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.colors":"#E50914,#5C5C5C","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.showGrid":"true","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.trend_area.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_content_table":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.content_table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_top_titles"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.content_table.columns":"title_name,type,views,rating,weeks_in_top10,genre","netflix_viz_pack.content_table.maxRows":"0","netflix_viz_pack.content_table.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.content_table.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.content_table.accentIntensity":"50"},"eventHandlers":[{"type":"drilldown.setToken","options":{"tokens":[{"token":"selected_title","value":"$click.value$"}]}}]},"viz_engagement_completion":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_engagement_completion"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.maxValue":"100","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.label":"Completion Rate","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.unit":"%","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.showGlow":"true","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentIntensity":"60"}},"viz_engagement_bounce":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_engagement_bounce"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.maxValue":"20","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.label":"Bounce Rate","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.unit":"%","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.showGlow":"true","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentColor":"#F0B429","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentIntensity":"40"}},"viz_engagement_repeat":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_engagement_repeat"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.field":"value","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.maxValue":"100","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.label":"Repeat Viewing","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.unit":"%","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.decimals":"1","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.showGlow":"true","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentColor":"#46D369","netflix_viz_pack.engagement_gauge.accentIntensity":"50"}},"viz_genre_bars":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_genre_performance"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.labelField":"genre","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.valueField":"total_views","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.shareField":"share_pct","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.maxBars":"10","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.unit":"","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.showValues":"true","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.genre_bars.accentIntensity":"50"},"eventHandlers":[{"type":"drilldown.setToken","options":{"tokens":[{"token":"selected_genre","value":"$click.value$"}]}}]},"viz_region_board":{"type":"netflix_viz_pack.region_board","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_regional"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.regionField":"region","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.subscribersField":"subscribers","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.revenueField":"revenue","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.growthField":"growth","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.topTitleField":"top_title","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.theme":"dark","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.accentColor":"#E50914","netflix_viz_pack.region_board.accentIntensity":"50"},"eventHandlers":[{"type":"drilldown.setToken","options":{"tokens":[{"token":"selected_region","value":"$click.value$"}]}}]},"viz_overview_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"SUBSCRIBER GROWTH","fontColor":"rgba(245,245,241,0.30)","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_titles_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"TOP PERFORMING TITLES","fontColor":"rgba(245,245,241,0.30)","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_engagement_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"ENGAGEMENT HEALTH","fontColor":"rgba(245,245,241,0.30)","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_genre_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"GENRE PERFORMANCE","fontColor":"rgba(245,245,241,0.30)","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_region_label":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"REGIONAL BREAKDOWN","fontColor":"rgba(245,245,241,0.30)","fontSize":"extraSmall","fontFamily":"Splunk Platform Sans","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"viz_canvas_bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#141414","strokeColor":"transparent"}}},"inputs":{},"layout":{"globalInputs":[],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"tab_overview","label":"Overview"},{"layoutId":"tab_titles","label":"Titles"},{"layoutId":"tab_engagement","label":"Engagement"},{"layoutId":"tab_regions","label":"Regions"}],"options":{"barPosition":"top","showTabBar":true}},"layoutDefinitions":{"tab_overview":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1080},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1080}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":56}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":6,"w":600,"h":44}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":56,"w":1920,"h":3}},{"item":"viz_kpi_subscribers","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":80,"w":420,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_kpi_revenue","type":"block","position":{"x":460,"y":80,"w":420,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_kpi_hours","type":"block","position":{"x":900,"y":80,"w":420,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_stat_strip","type":"block","position":{"x":1340,"y":80,"w":560,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_overview_label","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":258,"w":300,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_trend_area","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":284,"w":1180,"h":380}},{"item":"viz_genre_label","type":"block","position":{"x":1220,"y":258,"w":300,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_genre_bars","type":"block","position":{"x":1220,"y":284,"w":680,"h":380}},{"item":"viz_region_label","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":684,"w":300,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_region_board","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":710,"w":1880,"h":340}}]},"tab_titles":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1080},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1080}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":56}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":6,"w":600,"h":44}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":56,"w":1920,"h":3}},{"item":"viz_titles_label","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":76,"w":400,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_content_table","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":104,"w":1880,"h":700}},{"item":"viz_genre_bars","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":824,"w":940,"h":240}},{"item":"viz_trend_area","type":"block","position":{"x":980,"y":824,"w":920,"h":240}}]},"tab_engagement":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1080},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1080}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":56}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":6,"w":600,"h":44}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":56,"w":1920,"h":3}},{"item":"viz_engagement_label","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":76,"w":400,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_engagement_completion","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":108,"w":620,"h":400}},{"item":"viz_engagement_bounce","type":"block","position":{"x":660,"y":108,"w":620,"h":400}},{"item":"viz_engagement_repeat","type":"block","position":{"x":1300,"y":108,"w":600,"h":400}},{"item":"viz_stat_strip","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":528,"w":1880,"h":120}},{"item":"viz_trend_area","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":668,"w":1880,"h":380}}]},"tab_regions":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1920,"height":1080},"structure":[{"item":"viz_canvas_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":1080}},{"item":"viz_banner_bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1920,"h":56}},{"item":"viz_banner_title","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":6,"w":600,"h":44}},{"item":"viz_banner_accent","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":56,"w":1920,"h":3}},{"item":"viz_region_label","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":76,"w":400,"h":24}},{"item":"viz_region_board","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":108,"w":1880,"h":440}},{"item":"viz_kpi_subscribers","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":568,"w":460,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_kpi_revenue","type":"block","position":{"x":500,"y":568,"w":460,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_kpi_hours","type":"block","position":{"x":980,"y":568,"w":460,"h":160}},{"item":"viz_genre_bars","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":748,"w":1880,"h":310}}]}}}}
